ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_overview" (
  "overview_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each overview record */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the dataset */,
  "a_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of students who received an A grade */,
  "b_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of students who received a B grade */,
  "c_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of students who received a C grade */,
  "d_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of students who received a D grade */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year the performance overview pertains to */,
  "term" TEXT /* Specific term (e.g., Fall, Spring, Summer) */,
  "total_students_with_missing_data" INTEGER /* Number of students with incomplete data */,
  "average_gpa" REAL /* Average GPA of students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("overview_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the student group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the student group */,
  "group_type" TEXT /* Type of the student group (e.g., gender, ethnicity, socioeconomic status) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the group was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_by_group" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student group */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the group */,
  "a_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of students who received an A grade */,
  "b_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of students who received a B grade */,
  "c_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of students who received a C grade */,
  "d_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of students who received a D grade */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year the performance metrics pertain to */,
  "term" TEXT /* Specific term */,
  "average_gpa" REAL /* Average GPA of students in the group */,
  "standardized_test_score" REAL /* Average standardized test score of students in the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student's gender */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student's ethnicity */,
  "socioeconomic_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student's socioeconomic status */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Current grade of the student (e.g., A, B, C, D) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the institution */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date when the student is expected to graduate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_socioeconomic_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("socioeconomic_status_id") REFERENCES socioeconomic_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender category */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "socioeconomic_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each socioeconomic status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the socioeconomic status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the course information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of teaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "final_grade" TEXT /* Final grade received in the course (e.g., A, B, C, D) */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year of the enrollment */,
  "term" TEXT /* Specific term */,
  "midterm_grade" TEXT /* Midterm grade received in the course */,
  "final_exam_score" REAL /* Score received in the final exam */,
  "attendance_percentage" REAL /* Attendance percentage of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, teacher, student) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
